company.name: ARCH CAPITAL GROUP LTD.
company.security: Arch Capital Group Ltd. - Common Stock

commentary: FY 2025: PS 1.71x, operating profit --B, normalized NI proxy 4.25B.
Normalized net income proxy growth is 1.77% YoY, trend improving.
Normalized P/E proxy is 8.03x based on current market cap.
5Y market-cap payback ratio is 114.05% using 3Y geometric revenue growth.
methodology: Fee-adjusted net income proxy = net income - stock-based compensation expense.
Normalized net income proxy = fee-adjusted net income proxy - absolute special items.
5Y market-cap payback ratio = projected next 5 years normalized NI proxy sum / current market cap.
Projection growth uses 3Y geometric revenue growth.
